research_question: What are the long-term outcomes of CBT for anxiety-related disorders compared to other treatments or control conditions?

population.name: Population
include: adults (≥18 years) with a primary anxiety-related disorder
specific phobia, social anxiety disorder, panic disorder, agoraphobia, GAD, OCD, PTSD
exclude: comorbid anxiety as secondary diagnosis only

intervention.name: Intervention
include: CBT variants (ACT, MBCT, DBT with CBT component)

outcome.name: Outcome
exclude: outcomes measured only at post-treatment (no follow-up data)
